qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum amount of shared filesystem storage available for Digital Research Alliance of Canada cloud Rapid Access Service (RAS) resources?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum amount of shared filesystem storage available for Digital Research Alliance of Canada cloud Rapid Access Service (RAS) resources is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for compute instances provisioned through the Digital Research Alliance of Canada's Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: Compute instances provisioned through the Rapid Access Service (RAS) have a default duration of one year, which includes a one-month wall-time, aligning with the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) allocation period from April to March.

qa_pairs.question: How does one request access to the Digital Research Alliance of Canada's Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: To request access to the Rapid Access Service (RAS), users need to complete the online form provided by the Digital Research Alliance of Canada.
